feature_groups.name: Profitability
feature_groups.description: ROA, ROE, net income margin va cac bien phan anh kha nang sinh loi.

feature_groups.name: Growth
feature_groups.description: Tang truong doanh thu, loi nhuan va cac bien so sanh theo quy/nam.

feature_groups.name: Asset quality
feature_groups.description: Chi bao chat luong tai san, provision va cac dau hieu lien quan rui ro tin dung.

feature_groups.name: Capital & liquidity
feature_groups.description: Cac ty le von, thanh khoan va cau truc bang can doi.

feature_groups.name: Market signals
feature_groups.description: Gia, return, volatility va tin hieu thi truong lien quan co phieu.

feature_groups.name: Lag / rolling features
feature_groups.description: Gia tri tre va bien tong hop rolling giup model nhin xu huong lich su.
